visible_defects.defect: Baluster spacing measures ~6 inches between rails

vision_analysis.context_notes: Deck is approximately 8 ft above grade.

input.transcript: Deck railing balusters are too far apart — about six inches. Should be no more than four. Kid could fit through. Safety issue.

expected.rationale: SoP §3.2 explicitly names this: 'improper spacing between intermediate balusters'. Fall hazard for small children.

visible_defects.defect: Grade slopes toward foundation on north side

vision_analysis.context_notes: Visible erosion channel approaches foundation wall.

input.transcript: North side of house — ground slopes toward the foundation. You can see the erosion. Need to re-grade. Could lead to basement moisture.

expected.rationale: Negative grading is one of the most common findings. Cheap to fix, prevents costly moisture issues. Minor repair, not major unless active water intrusion.

vision_analysis.primary_subject: window trim with gap in caulk

visible_defects.defect: Gap in caulk at top of window trim, ~1/8 inch wide, 6 inches long

input.transcript: Caulk has separated above this window. Small gap. Re-caulk before next rainy season.

expected.rationale: Routine maintenance item. Minor repair, no specialty trade needed.
